data.text/markdown:
Setup — Screen Layout Preference

Some lessons display a 3D model next to the controls. On a wide or ultrawide screen this works best with a two-column layout; on a standard screen a single-column layout is more comfortable. Your choice is saved to ~/.marimocad_prefs.json and applied automatically whenever you open a lesson. It is not tracked by git.

data.text/html: <marimo-ui-element object-id='vblA-0' random-id='e23a0ca1-3ee7-0777-5844-54feff5bd0d3'><marimo-radio data-initial-value='"medium — single column (default)"' data-label='"<span class=\"markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents\"><span class=\"paragraph\">Preferred layout</span></span>"' data-options='["medium — single column (default)","columns — controls left, model right"]' data-inline='false' data-disabled='false'></marimo-radio></marimo-ui-element>

<marimo-ui-element object-id='bkHC-0' random-id='3f3dba08-be70-de77-f80f-95e9c2438adc'><marimo-button data-initial-value='0' data-label='"<span class=\"markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents\"><span class=\"paragraph\">Save preference</span></span>"' data-kind='"success"' data-disabled='false' data-full-width='false'></marimo-button></marimo-ui-element>

<marimo-callout-output data-html='"<span class=\"markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents\"><span class=\"paragraph\">Saved <strong>columns</strong> layout.<br />\nRe-open any lesson to apply the new setting.</span></span>"' data-kind='"success"'></marimo-callout-output>
